title: performance.jsonl as store; report reads it; group by basename; hook upserts session
action: Make performance.jsonl the persistent store: add collectSessionRollups/sessionRecord/readSessionRecords(dedup by session_id)/upsertSessionRecords(rewrite)/syncSessionsToLog/buildMatrixFromLog(group by projectName basename) + projectName; renderMatrixHtml row label=basename, title=full paths. bee perf report READS the log (auto-sync backfill if empty); add bee perf sync. hook maybePerfRefresh writes the current session rollup (upsert) then rebuilds HTML from the log (one transcript, no cross-project scan). Update tests.

truths: report reads performance.jsonl, not a live scan
projects grouped by last folder name (basename); same-basename paths merge, full paths kept
hook upserts current session by id then rebuilds HTML from the log, fail-open
perf sync backfills all sessions into the log
prohibitions: report must not scan transcripts at view time

trace.outcome: performance.jsonl is the store; report reads it; matrix grouped by last-folder basename; hook upserts current session then rebuilds HTML from the log. bee perf sync added. 3 suites green + real e2e (237 sessions)
trace.verification_evidence: { "deliberate_exceptions": ["Redesign of the just-shipped matrix per user direction: performance.jsonl becomes the persistent store, the HTML is a pure read grouped by last-folder basename, and the hook upserts the current session. Prior behavior (transcript-scan-at-view) is replaced. Proof = test_perf 30/0, test_bee_cli 139/0, test_hook_contracts ALL PASS, + real e2e syncing 237 sessions into performance.jsonl and rendering the basename-grouped matrix." ] }
trace.verify_output: test_perf 30/0 (incl. store: syncSessionsToLog/readSessionRecords/upsert dedup/buildMatrixFromLog basename grouping + same-basename merge); test_bee_cli 139/0 (perf.report reads log + perf.sync); test_hook_contracts ALL PASS (session upsert + rebuild fail-open); real e2e: sync 237 sessions/11 projects into performance.jsonl (167KB), matrix grouped by basename (beegog/anphabe-gogl/airemote...)
